top_findings.summary: The skill description for a revenue forecasting platform integration requests broad local system permissions (Read, Write, Glob, Grep, Bash) that are excessive and unrelated to its primary purpose of interacting with a cloud API. An API integration skill should primarily require network access (WebFetch) for API calls and possibly Read/Write for credential storage, but unrestricted file system scanning (Glob), text searching (Grep), and arbitrary command execution (Bash) pose significant security risks without clear justification in the use cases described.
